item.title: Forecasting and Mitigating Disruptions in Public Bus Transit Services
item.description: This paper shows the disruptions forecasting model and bus-dispatch simulation according to them. Published in Conference AAMAS 2024 (Acceptance rate: 25%)

item.title: A Framework for Perception Analysis of Social Media Data During Disease Outbreaks: Uncovering Patterns of Resentment Towards Bats.
item.description: This paper shows a domain-specific machine learning framework for analyzing social media data. Published in HICSS57.

item.title: Visual Active Search
item.description: This project presents how to detect image data correctly with small training dataset to defense machine learning models from poisoning attacks.

item.title: Forecasting Bus Disruptions
item.description: This project presents how to forecast bus disruptions and dispatch reserved buses to stops.

item.title: Social Media Data Analysis
item.description: This is an archive of projects related to analyzing text data scraped from online such as Twitter, Reddit, or all kinds of online social media data. The goal of these works are to delve into various social trends such as people's sentiments and interests related to several different social topics within social media posts using natural language processing models.

item.title: Detecting Fake Audios
item.description: This project uncovers human traits for detecting fake audios and build machine learning models according to them.

item.title: A study on the development and evaluation of personalized book recommendation systems in university libraries based on individual loan records
item.description: This paper shows how a book recommendation system in university library can be personalized using machine learning models. Published in Journal of the Korean Society for information Management, 2021.

item.title: Embedding-based neural network models for book recommendation in university libraries
item.description: This paper shows personalized recommendation system in university libraries. Published in Workshop on AI + Informetrics, AII 2021.

item.title: Personalized Book Recommendation
item.description: This project presents how to personalize recommendation systems in university libraries.

item.title: Location
item.description: Mailing and office addresses at the University of Place.

item.title: Office Hours
item.description: Schedule and location for office hours.
